title: biscutella laevigata subsp. angustifolia
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. angustifolia, commonly known as the narrow-leaved biscutella, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its narrow leaves and small yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Biscutella laevigata subsp. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
